description: Initial placeholder experiments only. No scientific claims. These define the interpretation surface where resource-estimation thinking is mapped onto software intervention governance.

experiments.name: Resource Consequence Ledger — interpretation placeholder
experiments.objective: Demonstrate how explicit resource accounting maps onto a software intervention's predicted consequences.
experiments.notes: Lightweight, no quantum dependencies required. Local-only.

experiments.name: Simulation-before-write cost framing — interpretation placeholder
experiments.objective: Frame simulation cost vs. intervention risk as an accounting tradeoff inspired by circuit simulation scaling.
experiments.notes: Conceptual placeholder. Not executed in the web runtime.

boundary: This annex is a research and interpretation layer. It does not claim quantum advantage, does not run production quantum workloads, does not imply affiliation with Google, and does not modify CodeWorld's core simulation-first repository governance thesis.
